title: Short title
doc_html:
PART VII.  STRUCTURAL PEST CONTROL

§3361.  Short title

The provisions of this Part shall be known and may be cited as the Structural Pest Control Law.

Acts 1984, No. 800, §1, eff. July 13, 1984.

§3361.  Short title
